text.title: Freelance Marketplace Platform Tradeoffs Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Freelance Marketplace Platform Tradeoffs output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: rate_band populated with a typed value
candidate_platforms populated with a typed value
exclusivity_status populated with a typed value
primary_platform populated with a typed value
ramp_timeline populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
